adr_entry: No new architectural patterns, shared interfaces, or dependency changes. The implementation applies the existing spatial gradient module pattern (aVertexColor attribute, uHasVertexColor uniform guard, mix-based fallback) already documented in the spatialGradient.ts ADR to five additional visual systems. The new computeVibrantVertexColors helper is a convenience wrapper within the existing module, not a new abstraction. The fractalGrowth GLSL-side gradient is a localized shader technique. Subtractive removal of aHueOffset and HSL color loops follows existing dead-code cleanup precedent.
